memoryArtifacts.description: About 1/4 of all the knights that William Conqueror took with him were of Breton extraction. They occupied the mid level echelons of the Norman hierarchy. Guilloume is one of those Bretons.

It is not possible that Sir Guilloume had been living for decades in England decades before 1066, and later joined the Norman forces at the Battle of Hastings in 1066. Either way, he would've been a knight and therefore would've had armor of this type.

sourceList.title: The Autobiography and Correspondence of Sir Simonds D'Ewes
Gene Carlton Clopton's 1984 book The Clopton Family

zh.lifeSummary: 當William Pecche於大約1068年出生在法國布列塔尼分尼斯艾可盧阿時，他的父親Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne28歲，母親Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy23歲。他於大約1089年與Isilia Bourges在英國英格蘭素福爾可維其哈布盧可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1100年在英國英格蘭素福爾可維其哈布盧可享年34歲。

nameMeanings.name: Pecche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: possibly a variant of   Pech   ‘pitch, tar’.
Americanized form of Slovenian Peče or of its Germanized form Petsche , which is also a Gottscheerish (i.e. Gottschee German) surname.

variants.name: Pech
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jose, Manuel, Alvaro, Diego, Edelmira, Emilio, Francisco, Gilberto, Jorge, Jose Angel.  German Gerhard, Hans, Ilse, Lutz, Manfred, Wolf.

Czech and Slovak; Sorbian (Pěch and P'ech): from a pet form of the personal name Petr (Czech), Pětš (Lower Sorbian), and Peter (Slovak). This is also a Germanized form of the Upper Sorbian cognate Pjech.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): from Middle High German pech (German Pech) ‘pitch, tar’, presumably a nickname for someone with exceptionally dark skin or hair, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who prepared, sold, or used pitch. This may in part also be the origin of a homonymic Polish, Czech, and Slovak surname (compare above and below).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Pecche was born about 1068, in Kerlouan, Finistère, Brittany, France, his father, Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne, was 28 and his mother, Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy, was 23. He married Isilia Bourges about 1089, in Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died about 1100, in Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 34.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Pecche est né environ 1068, à Kerlouan, Finistère, Bretagne, France, son père, Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Isilia Bourges environ 1089, à Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1100, à Wickhambrook, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 34 ans.

Er hat um 1089 in Wickhambrook, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Isilia Bourges geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. ja.lifeSummary: William Peccheが約1068年にフランスブレタグンフィニストeアケルロウアンで生まれた時，父Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagneは28歳，母Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucyは23歳であった。約1089年にイギリスイギリススフォルクウィックハンブルークでIsilia Bourgesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は約1100年にイギリスイギリススフォルクウィックハンブルークで34歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Pecche(이)가 대략 1068년 프랑스 브레타그니 핑니스트e르 켈를루아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1089년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 윅함브룩에서 Isilia Bourges(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1100년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 윅함브룩에서 34세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Pecche родился около 1068 г. в местности кирлоуань, финистeр, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Geoffroy II comte du Perche et de Mortagne было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Béatrix de Ramerupt de Montdidier de Roucy, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Isilia Bourges около 1089 г. в местности виккхамбрук, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1100 г. в местности виккхамбрук, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 34 лет.
